seoTitle: Chatham Valley vs Chatsbury — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chatham Valley and Chatsbury. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Chatham Valley vs Chatsbury: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chatham Valley and Chatsbury.
heading: Chatham Valley vs Chatsbury — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chatham Valley, New South Wales and Chatsbury, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chatsbury has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Chatham Valley (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chatham Valley or Chatsbury safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chatham Valley has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Chatsbury scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chatham Valley scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Chatsbury scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chatham Valley or Chatsbury?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chatsbury has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
